evidence.label: Recurrent VTE
evidence.text: Recurrent VTE occurred in 67 (12.8%) edoxaban vs 71 (13.5%) dalteparin patients (HR 0.97; 95% CI, 0.70 to 1.36; P=0.006 for noninferiority).

evidence.label: Recurrent VTE
evidence.text: VTE recurrence at 6 months: 8 (7.9%) rivaroxaban vs 18 (17.6%) dalteparin (HR 0.43; 95% CI, 0.19 to 0.99).

evidence.label: Recurrent VTE
evidence.text: Recurrent VTE: 1 (0.7%) apixaban vs 9 (6.3%) dalteparin (HR 0.26; 95% CI, 0.09 to 0.80; P=0.02).

evidence.label: Recurrent VTE
evidence.text: Recurrent VTE occurred in 32 (5.6%) apixaban vs 46 (7.9%) dalteparin (HR 0.63; 95% CI, 0.37 to 1.07; P<0.001 for noninferiority).
